Project.title: Project
Project.description: A collection representing user projects or categories of tasks

name.description: The custom name of the task list/project

color.description: Tailwind color class or hex code representing the category highlight color

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this project

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created

Task.title: Task
Task.description: An individual task that can belong to a project and can contain subtasks

projectId.description: The ID of the project/list this task belongs to

title.description: The main action item of the task

description.description: Optional detailed explanation of the task

dueDate.description: Optional iso-date or date string representing when the task is due

subtasks.description: List of simple checklist items for this task

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this task

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the task was created

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the task was last updated

projects/{projectId}.description: A top-level collection containing task lists/projects

tasks/{taskId}.description: A top-level collection containing tasks filtered by ownerId and projectId
